'''valala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilbean|oilbean]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilbean|oilbean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| valala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vælælæth|vælælæth]] || [[word:vælælæj|vælælæj]] || [[word:vælælæsh|vælælæsh]] || [[word:vælælæ|vælælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:valalalath|valalalath]] || [[word:valalalaj|valalalaj]] || [[word:valalalash|valalalash]] || [[word:valalala|valalala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:valalath|valalath]] || [[word:valalaj|valalaj]] || [[word:valalash|valalash]] || [[word:valala|valala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:valaflath|valaflath]] || [[word:valaflaj|valaflaj]] || [[word:valaflash|valaflash]] || [[word:valaflaf|valaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:valalatha|valalatha]] || [[word:valalaja|valalaja]] || [[word:valalasha|valalasha]] || [[word:valalaka|valalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:valalath|valalath]] || [[word:valalaj|valalaj]] || [[word:valalash|valalash]] || [[word:valala|valala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:valalathal|valalathal]] || [[word:valalajal|valalajal]] || [[word:valalashal|valalashal]] || [[word:valalakal|valalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:valalathatha|valalathatha]] || [[word:valalajaja|valalajaja]] || [[word:valalashasha|valalashasha]] || [[word:valalaka|valalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:valalathan|valalathan]] || [[word:valalajan|valalajan]] || [[word:valalashan|valalashan]] || [[word:valalakan|valalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:valalathaoro|valalathaoro]] || [[word:valalajaoro|valalajaoro]] || [[word:valalashaoro|valalashaoro]] || [[word:valalakaoro|valalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
